name: Choso Kamo
description:
— 🐉 | 𝐌𝐚𝐟𝐢𝐚 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬

⋆ 𝐅𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐕 ⋆

"𝐈𝐬 𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐄𝐥𝐬𝐞?", 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐖𝐞𝐞𝐤𝐧𝐝 - 𝐒𝐩𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐲

I'm going to try to do a triple upload today and a double upload tomorrow, as I'm on a tight deadline. I have an order in hand and two event bots that I want to publish by the 18th... god help me.

ㅤ

ㅤ

☆ 𝐈𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐬𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨, 𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐬𝐨 𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐬𝐮𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐰𝐡𝐨 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐬𝐩𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐧 𝐡𝐢𝐦 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐬, 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

(Any bot bugs/errors, such as incomplete text, responses generated from {{char}} to {{user}} and others, are errors by LLM itself. I tested the bot several times and did my best in the settings to alleviate these problems.)

ㅤ

ㅤ

I recently discovered that my mind works a thousand times better when I follow a schedule, so that's what this session is about. Well, October is coming (yes, I know it's over a month away) and with the arrival of October two things come with it: Kinktober and Halloween. Being the anxious person that I am, I already have two series planned for these dates.

For Kinktober, we will have "Kinkaboo", a mixed series between KNY and JJK, with three weekly bots until Halloween week (October 1st to October 25th). Kinks will have three levels, "easy, medium and hard" (I can make an extreme level if you want 👀) and each week we will advance one level. I will be taking suggestions from Kinks, however, I already have almost everything in mind.

For Halloween we will have "Thriller Night", also a mixed series between KNY and JJK with TWO daily bots from October 26th until October 31st. This series, however, will only contain the villains from KNY and JJK (if everything goes well, I will be able to include all the Oni from KNY in the series 🙏)

Finally, this is the fixed schedule for October and I'm looking forward to it hehe. Now, I'm focused on finishing the JJK Mafia series by tomorrow at the latest, make the two event bots I have planned and publishing the request I owe (which request will be part of the "Pheromones" miniseries - No, that's not about the ABO universe - but I'll explain more about it to you later)

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝐔𝐏𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐒:

𝐍𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐦𝐢 𝐊𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐨: 𝐅𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐢𝐧

𝐇𝐢𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢 𝐇𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐮𝐦𝐚: 𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐢𝐧

𝐌𝐞𝐠𝐮𝐦𝐢 𝐅𝐮𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐨: 𝐊𝐚𝐢𝐤𝐞𝐢

𝐘𝐮𝐣𝐢 𝐈𝐭𝐚𝐝𝐨𝐫𝐢: 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐢 - 𝐒𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐭

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𝐎𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐒:

𝐑𝐲𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐧 𝐒𝐮𝐤𝐮𝐧𝐚: 𝐎𝐲𝐚𝐛𝐮𝐧

𝐓𝐨𝐣𝐢 𝐅𝐮𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐨: 𝐒𝐚𝐢𝐤𝐨-𝐤𝐨𝐦𝐨𝐧

𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐮 𝐆𝐨𝐣𝐨: 𝐖𝐚𝐤𝐚𝐠𝐚𝐬𝐡𝐢𝐫𝐚
